content.en:
"Eternal Force!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

Once the Eternal Immortal Sacrament has been raised to its limit, the power of Eternity will be born.

The power of eternity can make Ye Tian have more powerful explosive power, and he can make Ye Tian's defense reach the level of terror, which can be called an eternal and unbreakable defense.

In short, once he had the power of eternity, it would be a little difficult for Ye Tian to fall.

After the breakthrough of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than in the past.

At this time, Ye Tian had just broken through, and his aura had not been able to completely converge, and his aura had reached an incomparably terrifying level, which shocked the ancestors of the Qingyang Domain.

"This ...... It's just that the Holy Body has broken through to the limit realm from the consummation, how can the aura skyrocket so much?"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor was dumbfounded.

"No matter!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor continued to urge the Taichen Sword Projection Sword, aimed at Ye Tian, and burst out with a full force.

The power of this blow even carries the power of the Holy Soul!

I saw that the Holy Soul of the Qingyang Domain Ancestor fused with the main body, turning into a shocking giant, holding the Taichen Sword Projection Sword and piercing it with a sword.

This sword shattered time and space, enough to annihilate everything.

But Ye Tian was not afraid at all.

"Golden Body Holy Technique!"

"Holy Armor Holy Technique!"

"Eternal Force!"

......

Layers of defense stacked together, forming a thick shroud of eternity.

Bang!!!!

The sword of the Taichen Sword projection descended and stabbed on Ye Tian's Eternal Cover.

"The Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor will definitely not be able to stop the Taichen Sword Projection Sword!"

The Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor in the distance said coldly.

The Bloody Domain Ancestor in the secret was also a little nervous, but he couldn't help Ye Tian.

If it weren't for Ye Tian's real body, otherwise he would be really flustered.

In the eyes of Zhanmen, Ye Tian's talent has been recognized by all the high-level leaders, and his future achievements are very high, and there is a great possibility that he will reach the level of a non-superior domain ancestor.

There is no shortage of invincible domain ancestors in the battle gate, but there is only a lack of superior domain ancestors.

Whether it is in the Dark Sanctuary or in the Dark Destruction Domain, the Ancestors of the Peerless Domain are very rare, and they are truly top-notch existences.

Therefore, in the eyes of the Battle Gate, one Ye Tian was more precious than ten thousand top-notch supreme domain ancestors.

If Ye Tian fell, then the loss of the battle gate would be great.

Fortunately, it is a clone, if Ye Tian is really up, it is impossible for the battle gate to allow Ye Tian to challenge the ghost fox organization like this.

Of course, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor didn't want Ye Tian's clone to fall here, otherwise it would leave Ye Tian with a knot.

"I hope the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor can block this blow!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor muttered.

----------------

In front of everyone's eyes, the sword of the Taichen Sword projection collided with the Eternal Cover.

Click!!!

The Shroud of Eternity cracked a crack, but only a crack, but the Shroud of Eternity did not shatter.

"Blocked!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Although he had just used the Time Fragment Divine Technique to spy on the future picture, he also knew that the Eternal Shroud could block the Taichen Sword's projection sword.

But at this moment, he was relieved when he really blocked it.

"How could it be blocked? This is the full force of the Taichen Sword's projection sword!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor was stunned.

He also planned to hit Ye Tian hard with a sword, or after killing Ye Tian, he would instantly use the Cause-and-Effect Divine Technique of Fruitless Destruction to kill Ye Tian's body across the endless territory.

But I never expected that the full strength of the Taichen Sword's projection sword did not hit Ye Tian hard, and it was impossible for the fruitless Destruction Saint Technique to kill Ye Tian, let alone kill Ye Tian's body!

"You just attacked me, it's my turn!"

Ye Tian sneered.

At this moment, Qingyang Domain Ancestor felt a crisis, and it was a death crisis.

"Not good!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestor was shocked.

Immediately, he wanted to escape.

After all, he had already condensed the Holy Soul, if it weren't for the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor coming to him, after he stabilized the Holy Soul Realm that he had just broken through, he would have gone to the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm.

Once he reached the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm and obtained a Natal Divine Endowment that was most suitable for him, he could cultivate a Divine Technique that was most suitable for him, and then cultivate the Holy Technique to the Perfection Realm, or even the Extreme Realm.

In that case, his strength will reach a very terrifying level, and in the near future, he may be able to reach the level of the Ten Emperors of the Ghost Fox Organization, not weaker than the Bird Battle Domain Ancestor.

Therefore, he didn't want to die, at least not in this meaningless battle.

He, with an infinite future, how can he die here!

At this moment, he regretted it!

If he had known this, he should not have agreed to the Bird War Domain Ancestor to take on this task at all.

With his status and the qualifications that condensed the Holy Soul, even if he refused, the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor would be angry and would not do anything to him.

After all, he has hit the realm of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, and he will also be one of the Ten Emperors in the future, can the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor help him?

No!

Therefore, even if he refused, he would only be punished a little now, and it would not affect him much.

"Quick, rush into the Thunder Island Branch, and the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor can't kill it!"

Qingyang Domain Ancestral Dao.

"Run?"

Ye Tian sneered and cast the Five Elements Block.

After his strength soared, Ye Tian's Five Elements Blockade was many times terrifying, blocking the void at once, making it difficult for the Qingyang Domain Ancestor to break the blockade.

If he could continue to cast the Taichen Sword Projection Sword, he might be able to tear apart the Five Elements Prohibition with one sword.

But right now, he couldn't continue to use the Taichen Sword Projection Sword.

"Eternal Holy Technique!"

Ye Tian fixed the time, and also fixed the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

Then, Ye Tian used all his strength to perform the Void Slash Holy Technique.

Burst!

The Void Slash Saint Technique bombarded the body of the Qingyang Domain Ancestor.

And at this time, the Qingyang Domain Ancestor finally broke through the Eternal Saint Technique and woke up, but there was no way to avoid Ye Tian's Void Slash Saint Technique.

Bang!

Qingyang Domain Ancestor was directly knocked flying, and the power of the void slash penetrated into his body, injuring him, and the injury was not light.

If it was before, Ye Tian's Void Slash Saint Technique would not be able to hurt the Qingyang Domain Ancestor at all.

Ye Tian's blow was able to hurt the Qingyang Domain Ancestor, which meant that the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was in danger.

Next, Ye Tian went all out, and a holy skill was displayed.

Although the same holy skill cannot be cast continuously, it does not affect the continuous use of different holy skills.

Under the wild bombardment of a holy skill, the Qingyang Domain Ancestor was stunned, and his injuries became more and more serious, but his counterattack could not hurt Ye Tian.

In this way, Qingyang Domain Ancestor's injuries gradually approached serious damage.

According to such rules, the Qingyang Domain Ancestor is afraid that it will fall.

Wow!

An invincible domain ancestor's breath appeared, and it was very terrifying, even more powerful than the breath of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor.

He is the Ancestor of the Bird War Domain of the Ghost Fox Organization.

As soon as the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor appeared, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor also appeared, and he was afraid that the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor would attack Ye Tian.

In terms of strength, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor is indeed not the opponent of the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor, and there is even a certain probability that he will be killed by the other party, but he must also stand up, this is the task given to him by the Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate.

"Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor, what are you doing here?"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor stopped the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor and asked.
